current_suggestion.pitch: Your poker content skews heavily GTO — GTO Wizard, GTO Lab, Jared Alderman — but Jonathan Little brings a solver-informed yet exploitative, live-game-grounded perspective that steelmans the case for population-read adjustments over pure equilibrium play. He does hand history reviews, tournament strategy breakdowns, and interviews with elite players, with consistent depth on the mental game and decision-making under pressure, which bridges your poker and inner-game interests. Prolific output, recently active, and covers spots (ICM, live tells, big tournament hands) that your current lineup underserves.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
